Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &PesVenIntExt1 = nullvalue(&PesVenIntExt1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &PesVenIntExt2 = nullvalue(&PesVenIntExt2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &PesVenIntExt3 = nullvalue(&PesVenIntExt3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &IncluirDemitidos = 'N' &PesSts = nullvalue(&PesSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Cadastro Funcionários' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PesIsFun = true RetornaLinhaTam.Call(&linhaNumeric, &TamanhoNumeric) TableMain.Height = &TamanhoNumeric Grid.Rows = &linhaNumeric EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) PesCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Select = !'' &GridPesTipPessoa = PesIsFun PesCod.ColumnClass = iif(PesSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO, !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &InOutPesCod = PesCod Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPequisaFone' wpPesquisaFone.PopUp(&RetoPesCod) &RetoPesCod.SetFocus() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSeleciona' 4 do 'localizaCliente' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf1.Visible = False &PesSetCod1.Visible = False &PesSetNom1.Visible = False &PesVenIntExt1.Visible = False &RatCod1.Visible = False &PesCidCod1.Visible = False &PesCidNom1.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = False &PesFan1.Visible = False &PesCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCOD' &PesCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf2.Visible = False &PesSetCod2.Visible = False &PesSetNom2.Visible = False &PesVenIntExt2.Visible = False &RatCod2.Visible = False &PesCidCod2.Visible = False &PesCidNom2.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = False &PesFan2.Visible = False &PesCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCOD' &PesCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf3.Visible = False &PesSetCod3.Visible = False &PesSetNom3.Visible = False &PesVenIntExt3.Visible = False &RatCod3.Visible = False &PesCidCod3.Visible = False &PesCidNom3.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = False &PesFan3.Visible = False &PesCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCOD' &PesCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCOD' &PesCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' AND not &PesSetCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' AND not &PesSetNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' AND not &PesVenIntExt1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesVenIntExt1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCOD' AND not &PesCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETCOD' AND not &PesSetCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETNOM' AND not &PesSetNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESVENINTEXT' AND not &PesVenIntExt2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesVenIntExt2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCOD' AND not &PesCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETCOD' AND not &PesSetCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETNOM' AND not &PesSetNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESVENINTEXT' AND not &PesVenIntExt3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesVenIntExt3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCOD' AND not &PesCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &RetoPesCod.IsValid do 'localizaCliente' EndEvent Sub 'localizaCliente' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where PesCod = &RetoPesCod &InOutEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &InOutPesCod = &RetoPesCod Return Exit EndFor EndSub
